skills.name: metric_dimension_scaling
skills.title: Metric Dimension Scaling
skills.description: Transfer a known length, width, height, radius, or size to another target using image geometry.

skills.name: metric_distance_scaling
skills.title: Metric Distance Scaling
skills.description: Calibrate target depth or inter-object distance from a supplied metric reference and unit.

skills.name: dimension_ratio
skills.title: Dimension Ratio
skills.description: Compare lengths, widths, heights, areas, or dimension expressions as a numeric ratio or difference.

skills.name: volume_capacity
skills.title: Volume Capacity
skills.description: Reason about 3D volume ratios and capacity rather than visible instance counts.

skills.name: linear_fit_stacking
skills.title: Linear Fit and Stacking
skills.description: Compute how many repeated dimensions are needed to match a requested length, width, height, or area.

skills.name: object_counting
skills.title: Object Counting
skills.description: Count visible objects, parts, or instances with any inclusion and exclusion constraints.

skills.name: count_arithmetic
skills.title: Count Arithmetic
skills.description: Count multiple groups and apply deterministic arithmetic to their counts.

skills.name: count_comparison
skills.title: Count Comparison
skills.description: Determine which group has more, fewer, the same number, or enough instances.

skills.name: depth_ordering
skills.title: Depth Ordering
skills.description: Determine which target is closer, farther, nearest, or furthest in 3D.

skills.name: depth_filtered_counting
skills.title: Depth-filtered Counting
skills.description: Count targets that are in front of, behind, closer than, or farther than a reference.

skills.name: compass_direction
skills.title: Egocentric Compass Direction
skills.description: Resolve N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, or NW from the supplied observer position and facing direction.

skills.name: occlusion_visibility
skills.title: Occlusion and Visibility
skills.description: Determine whether a target remains visible or becomes covered after a hypothetical placement.

skills.name: physical_interaction
skills.title: Physical Interaction
skills.description: Reason about falling, hitting, pushing, tipping, hanging over an edge, or collision order.

skills.name: size_fit_comparison
skills.title: Size and Fit Comparison
skills.description: Compare dimensions or decide whether one object fits on, under, inside, or across another.

skills.name: relative_3d_position
skills.title: Relative 3D Position
skills.description: Resolve above, below, left, right, inside, on, under, adjacency, or elevation relations.

skills.name: visual_attribute_recognition
skills.title: Visual Attribute Recognition
skills.description: Answer residual Omni3D visual attribute and object-identification questions that are not geometric operations.
